# Felans FX

> AI-powered forex and crypto trade analysis platform with chart analysis, live binary options trading, signals, and a community feed.

Felans FX helps traders submit chart screenshots for AI analysis (entry, stop loss, take profit), practice on a live demo trading room, follow daily signals, and share trades with a community. Built for scalping and swing trading on forex and crypto pairs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Dashboard with wallet balance, quick actions, and AI/live trading entry points.
- [AI Analysis](/analyze): Upload a chart and get AI-generated trade analysis.
- [Live Trading](/trading): Binary options trading room with real and demo wallets.
- [Daily Streak](/daily-streak): Daily signals, market news, and trader guides.
- [Patterns Learning Hub](/patterns): Educational chart pattern library.
- [Community Feed](/feed): Public posts and trade sharing from other traders.
- [Help](/help): Frequently asked questions and support guidance.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account login and signup.

## Optional

- [Saved](/saved): User's bookmarked analyses.
- [History](/history): Past AI analyses.
- [Profile](/profile): User settings and KYC.
- [Deposit](/deposit): Add funds to the wallet.
- [Withdraw](/withdraw): Withdraw funds.
- [Invite](/invite): Referral program.
